## createCollapseAnimationMixin() function

Adds parametrized methods to a component to allow the collapsing of the provided property.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare function createCollapseAnimationMixin(property: AnimatedProperty): ComponentOptions<Vue>;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  property | AnimatedProperty | The property that will be animated. |

<b>Returns:</b>

ComponentOptions&lt;Vue&gt;

Mixin for the module.
